notes:
Total unique refs triaged: 37
Classification summary: {"TS_EXTRACTOR_BLIND_SPOT": 0, "TS_GAP_OTHER_PLATFORMS_HAVE": 13, "TRUE_FABRICATION_NOWHERE": 7, "NAME_DRIFT_TS_RENAMED": 14, "AMBIGUOUS": 3}

Especially interesting findings:
1. FeedRepository.getCommunityFeed: exists on iOS, Android, AND Flutter but MISSING in TS FeedRepository (which only has queryGlobalFeed). Strongest signal of a real SDK gap (3/4 platforms).
2. PostRepository.createPollPost: exists on iOS + Android but not TS. TS PostRepository has generic createPost — SDK lead needs to confirm whether createPost(pollPayload) covers this.
3. Client.registerPushNotification: exists on iOS + Android but not TS — push notification registration likely handled differently in web/TS SDK.
4. NAME_DRIFT batch (14 refs): All AmityXxx import-style refs (AmityClient, AmityComment, etc.) are old SDK v5.x naming. Current TS SDK uses global ambient namespace Amity.Xxx — these are NOT importable named exports. Single Tier-A task can fix all 14.
5. AdRepository analytics gap: markAdSeen + markAdClicked exist in Flutter (as MarkAdAsViewedUseCase/MarkAdAsClickedUseCase) but TS AdRepository only has getNetworkAds — ad impression/click tracking is a real TS gap.
6. CommunityRepository.Moderation.addRole/removeRole (2 refs): TS has these under ChannelRepository.Moderation — wrong repository name in docs. Ready for Tier-A fix.
7. PostRepository.createLivestreamPost → createRoomPost: migration-guide.mdx needs this rename as it IS the described migration.

Breakdown: TS_GAP_OTHER_PLATFORMS_HAVE=13 (FLAG_FOR_SDK tickets needed), NAME_DRIFT_TS_RENAMED=14 (Tier-A auto-fixable), TRUE_FABRICATION_NOWHERE=7 (delete/rewrite), AMBIGUOUS=3 (human decide), TS_EXTRACTOR_BLIND_SPOT=0.
